name: goalos-agijobmanager-ascension

scripts.build: npm run bootstrap && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v48.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v50.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v51.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v52.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v53.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v54.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v57.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v58.mjs && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v59.mjs && node tools/run-existing-kernels.mjs && CHECK_DIST=true node tools/public-trust-checker-v59.mjs
scripts.verify: python3 tools/verify.py && node tools/no-registry-preflight.mjs && node tools/pathspec-proof-kernel.mjs && node tools/workflow-reference-auditor.mjs
scripts.test: npm run bootstrap && npm run verify && npm run check:docs && npm run check:public-safe && npm run check:metadata && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs
scripts.test:strict: npm test && npm run assurance && npm run factual && npm run build && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary
scripts.test:zero-network: node tools/site-rehydrate.mjs && node tools/no-registry-preflight.mjs && node tools/pathspec-proof-kernel.mjs && node tools/run-documentation-tests.mjs && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs && node tools/run-existing-kernels.mjs
scripts.flight-deck: node tests/ascension-flight-deck.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/ascension-flight-deck-kernel.mjs

scripts.experience-hub: node tests/experience-hub.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/experience-hub-kernel.mjs
scripts.test:navigation: node tests/navigation-atlas.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-atlas-kernel.mjs

scripts.bootstrap: node tools/failsafe-bootstrap-v59.mjs && node tools/site-rehydrate.mjs && node tools/root-cleanup.mjs && node tools/apply-public-trust-metadata.mjs && node tools/route-recovery-v59.mjs

description: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension public proof institution with v59 canonical proof institution finalization, complete route recovery, browser-local public-safe demos, dynamic route manifest, and GitHub Pages publication.
